title: Intensely Savory Canadian Shrimp Noodles
description: A cozy Canadian dish featuring briny shrimp, bouncy noodles, and savory flavors, with shiso leaf and bhuna spice adding depth, this raw-friendly recipe is perfect for a cold winter night. It is cooked to a safe temperature in a wok.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the wok and set aside.
Add the noodles to the wok and cook for 2 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the soy sauce, bhuna spice, and shiso leaf to the wok and stir to combine.
Return the shrimp to the wok and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the noodles are cooked through and the sauce is bubbly.
Stir in the green onions and serve hot.
